prompt: is it actually safe to run postgres in kubernetes for production in 2026 or is that still a bad idea? getting conflicting advice from my team. we're a 3 person startup, ~50GB database
assertions: Represents both positions with at least one source each (does not flatten the controversy)
Explains the context-dependence (team size, ops maturity, data size) that resolves the contradiction
Gives a concrete recommendation for the stated context (3-person startup, 50GB)
Sources are dated or recency-checked (operator landscape changed substantially 2023-2026)
